attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.MESSAGE_ID, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.PO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.PO_VERSION, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.SO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.VENDOR_SITE_CODE, TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CM_SHIP_TO_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CM_SHIP_TO_ADDRESS, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.LOGISTICS_DIV_CODE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CISCO_DUNS, TRANSLATE(STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CARTON_REF_NOTES_HDR USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CUSTOMER_NOTES_HDR, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.TRAVELLER_NOTES_HDR, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CARTON_REF_NOTES_LINE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CANCELLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CANCEL_DATE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.RETRY_COUNT, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.NEG_ACK_COUNT, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.PO_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.MAJOR_PID, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ORG_CODE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.PROFORMA_INVOICE_VALUE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.FMF_FLAG, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.INDIA_LABEL, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CANADA_LABEL, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.KOREA_LABEL, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.PACKOUT_SOFTWARE_LABEL, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.DISTRIBUTOR_NAME, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.DISTRIBUTOR_ADDR1, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.DISTRIBUTOR_ADDR2, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.DISTRIBUTOR_ADDR3, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.DISTRIBUTOR_ADDR4, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.SCHEDULE_FLAG, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.UNS_MESSAGE_ID, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.DUTY_ATTRIBUTE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.PURCHASING_ENTITY_NAME, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ADDRESS_1, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ADDRESS_2, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.ADDRESS_3, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.TOWN_OR_CITY, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.POSTAL_CODE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.COUNTRY_NAME, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.REGION_1, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.REGION_2, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CNPJ_OR_DUNS, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CM_SHIP_FROM_NAME, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.CM_SHIP_FROM_ADDRESS, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.BARCODE_2D_FLAG, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.EAC_LABEL, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.REQUESTED_SHIP_DATE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.TARGET_FCD_DATE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.IOR_NAME, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.IOR_ADDRESS1, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.IOR_ADDRESS2, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.IOR_ADDRESS3, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.IOR_ADDRESS4, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.IOR_CITY, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.IOR_COUNTRY, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.IOR_NUMBER, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.IOR_ZIP_CODE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.IOR_STATE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE,
 (
 select MESSAGE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE
 minus
 select MESSAGE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MESSAGE_ID = STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.MESSAGE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_X_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_BACKLOG_OB_IFACE)
